scripts.build:libs: pnpm --filter @typefun/typing-core build && pnpm --filter @typefun/speech-queue build && pnpm --filter @typefun/key-sounds build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @typefun/typing-core test && pnpm --filter @typefun/speech-queue test && pnpm --filter @typefun/key-sounds test && pnpm --filter @typefun/api test
